title: Receiving and Spending Flow with Equal Ease
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the uneven relationship with money in and out, and allowing both to feel equally safe
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 79 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release targets the habit of gripping money on its way out and bracing on its way in; the allow names the calm, even flow where receiving and spending carry the same quality of ease.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 79 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 79 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 79: lock in ease around receiving and spending. The statement works with the uneven relationship many people have with money flow: spending produces anxiety, receiving produces guilt or disbelief. This names the equal ease and calls it in.
I am ready to release every trace of tension, guilt, or bracing around money moving in either direction. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow receiving and spending to feel equally safe, easy, and natural. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 79 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
